name: GroupTable
summary: Group tables store the list of groups in a Rhino document.

methods.name: Add()
methods.summary: Adds a new empty group to the group table.
methods.remarks: In some cases, calling Add() can cause the group indices to become invalid.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new group. -1 group not added because a group with that name already exists.

methods.name: Add(IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.summary: Adds a new group to the group table with a set of objects.
methods.remarks: In some cases, calling Add() can cause the group indices to become invalid.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of object IDs.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new group. -1 group not added because a group with that name already exists.

methods.name: Add(String)
methods.summary: Adds a new empty group to the group table.
methods.remarks: In some cases, calling Add() can cause the group indices to become invalid.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new group. -1 group not added because a group with that name already exists.

methods.name: Add(String, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public int Add(string groupName, IEnumerable<Guid> objectIds)
methods.summary: Adds a new group to the group table with a set of objects.
methods.remarks: In some cases, calling Add() can cause the group indices to become invalid.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of object IDs.

returns.doc: >=0 index of new group. -1 group not added because a group with that name already exists.

methods.name: AddToGroup(Int32, IEnumerable<Guid>)
methods.signature: public bool AddToGroup(int groupIndex, IEnumerable<Guid> objectIds)
methods.summary: Adds a list of objects to an existing group.

params.name: objectIds
params.doc: An array, a list or any enumerable set of IDs to objects.

returns.doc: true if at least an operation was successful.

methods.name: AddToGroup(Int32, Guid)
methods.signature: public bool AddToGroup(int groupIndex, Guid objectId)
methods.summary: Adds an object to an existing group.

returns.doc: true if the operation was successful.

methods.name: ChangeGroupName
methods.signature: public bool ChangeGroupName(int groupIndex, string newName)
methods.summary: Changes the name of a group.

returns.doc: true if successful, false otherwise.

methods.name: Clear
methods.summary: Marks all items as deleted.

methods.name: Delete(Group)
methods.summary: (Overrides CommonComponentTable<T>.Delete(T).)

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.DocObjects.Tables.GroupTable.Delete(Rhino.DocObjects.Group)"]

methods.name: Delete(Int32)
methods.summary: Deletes a group from this table. Deleted groups are kept in the runtime group table so that undo will work with groups. Call IsDeleted() to determine if a group is deleted.

params.name: groupIndex
params.doc: An group index to be deleted.

returns.doc: true if the operation was successful.

methods.name: FindId
methods.summary: Uses the guid to find a model component. Deleted objects cannot be found by id. The guid is the value that is stored in the .Id property. In a single document, no two active objects have the same guid. If an object is replaced with a new object, then the guid persists. For example, if the _Move command moves an object, then the moved object inherits its guid from the starting object. If the Copy command copies an object, then the copy gets a new guid. This guid persists through file saving/opening operations. This function will not find grip objects.

params.name: id
params.doc: ID of model component to search for.

returns.doc: Reference to the rhino object with the objectId or null if no such object could be found.

methods.name: FindIndex
methods.summary: Retrieves a Group object based on Index. This search type of search is discouraged. We are moving towards using only IDs for all tables.

returns.doc: A Group object, or null if none was found.

methods.name: FindName
methods.summary: Finds a group given its name. Returns the instance, rather than the index.

params.name: name
params.doc: The name of the group to be searched.

returns.doc: An group, or null on error.

methods.name: FindNameHash
methods.summary: Finds a group given its name hash.

params.name: nameHash
params.doc: The name hash of the group to be searched.

returns.doc: An group, or null on error.

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Returns the enumerator that yields all items.

returns.doc: [Missing <returns> documentation for "M:Rhino.FileIO.CommonComponentTable`1.GetEnumerator"]

methods.name: GroupMembers
methods.summary: Gets an array of all of the objects in a group.

params.name: groupIndex
params.doc: The index of the group in this table.

returns.doc: An array with all the objects in the specified group.

methods.name: GroupName
methods.summary: Returns the name of a group.

returns.doc: The group name.

methods.name: GroupNames
methods.summary: Returns an array of all group names.

params.name: ignoreDeletedGroups
params.doc: Ignore any groups that were deleted.

returns.doc: An array if group names if successful, null if there are no groups.

methods.name: GroupObjectCount
methods.summary: Returns the number of objects that are members of a group.

returns.doc: The number of objects that are members of the group.

methods.name: Hide
methods.summary: Hides all objects that are members of a group.

returns.doc: The number of objects that were hidden.

methods.name: IsDeleted
methods.summary: Verifies a group is deleted.

returns.doc: true if the group is deleted, false otherwise.

methods.name: Lock
methods.summary: Locks all objects that are members of a group.

returns.doc: The number of objects that were locked.

methods.name: RemapObjects(IEnumerable<RhinoObject>)
methods.summary: Remaps an enumeration of Rhino objects to new groups.
methods.remarks: In some situations, a bunch of Rhino objects are copied, new groups need to be created. This method handles the details.

returns.doc: The number of Rhino objects that were modified.

methods.name: RemapObjects(IEnumerable<RhinoObject>, Dictionary<Int32, Int32>)
methods.signature: public int RemapObjects(IEnumerable<RhinoObject> rhinoObjects, out Dictionary<int, int> indexMap)
methods.summary: Remaps an enumeration of Rhino objects to new groups.
methods.remarks: In some situations, a bunch of Rhino objects are copied, new groups need to be created. This method handles the details.

params.name: indexMap
params.doc: A map from old group indices to new group indices.

returns.doc: The number of Rhino objects that were modified.

methods.name: Show
methods.summary: Shows, or unhides, all objects that are members of a group.

returns.doc: The number of objects that were shown.

methods.name: Undelete
methods.summary: Undeletes a previously deleted group.

returns.doc: true if successful, false otherwise.

methods.name: Unlock
methods.summary: Unlocks all objects that are members of a group.

returns.doc: The number of objects that were unlocked.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Returns the count of all items, including deleted ones.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Conceptually, the group table is an array of groups. The operator[] can be used to get individual groups. A group is either active or deleted and this state is reported by Group.IsDeleted.
